privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real emails from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus. All required phrases and recipient parameters perfectly match the verifier logic. However, there is a critical defect: the target keyword 'razor' does not exist in any email in the dataset (neither subject nor body). Despite this, the task is still theoretically passable. The verifier only awards a 5-point bonus for matching 'razor' in the subject of the reply/forward; an agent can still achieve a passing score (up to 90/100, threshold 70) by replying to and forwarding ANY email in the inbox.
